'''Munlali Mafir''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]].

==History==
[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], and [[Soron Hegerty]] visited the planet during their search for [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]], narrowly escaping an attack by the indigenous [[Krizlaw]] and [[Jostran]] symbionts.

{{Planet-stub}}
